playbooks.title: Market Regime
playbooks.summary: Classify the market backdrop from supplied market data, macro context, and source gaps.

playbooks.title: Mover Themes
playbooks.summary: Group liquid movers into evidence-backed themes without turning rank into conviction.

playbooks.title: Instrument Evidence
playbooks.summary: Use instrument-level market, news, and Extended Evidence while preserving source boundaries.

playbooks.title: Market Behavior
playbooks.summary: Describe observable price, liquidity, volatility, and participation behavior from supplied evidence.

playbooks.title: Critique Discipline
playbooks.summary: Stress-test weak claims, missing evidence, and alternative explanations, and flag forecast claims whose stated probability outruns its evidence strength.

playbooks.title: Synthesis Discipline
playbooks.summary: Synthesize evidence into research-only output and set calibrated, base-rate-anchored prediction probabilities.

playbooks.title: Source Discipline
playbooks.summary: Label evidence posture for observed facts, claims, calculations, inferences, assumptions, stale inputs, conflicts, and missing sources.

playbooks.title: Thematic Research
playbooks.summary: Frame a market theme as sourced, representative-company evidence with dated catalysts and observable forecasts, never a ranked or best list.
